title: Unbounded Observer Set Growth
source_title: DAML Scalability Pattern - Observer Set Bloat
description: A template field of type `[Party]` is directly used as an observer and continuously appended to via a choice. Canton transactions will broadcast the contract to all observers, causing severe performance and privacy degradation over time.
recommendation: Use separate role contracts or a known-parties pattern instead of a single growing list of observers on a central registry.

oracle.description: Observer list must not grow unbounded via continuous list append operations.
oracle.static_signal: A list field used in the observer clause is appended to (e.g. `p :: list` or `list ++ [p]`) in a choice body.

notes: A very common architectural flaw in DAML registries.
